commands.review_summary:
The PR marks `alsoAllow`-only tool policies so plugin discovery can ignore only the synthetic wildcard, adds gateway and agent regression coverage, and updates Lobster/llm-task docs plus the changelog.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes from source inspection: current main converts `tools.alsoAllow` into an implicit `*` allow entry, forwards it into `pluginToolAllowlist`, and existing optional-plugin tests show `*` grants optional tools.
